description: A vertical candid operational photograph documenting an immigration arrest, with no on-image graphic design, captions, or seals overlaid. The scene is set outdoors in bright daylight against a tan/red brick wall topped by a black wrought-iron spiked security fence under a clear blue sky (consistent with the Southern California/Burbank location in the tweet). Three people stand facing the wall: at left a female officer wearing a navy windbreaker with large yellow block lettering reading 'ATF POLICE' across the back and her hair in a bun, jeans and sneakers; in the center a detained middle-aged man (face blurred/pixelated to obscure identity) in a blue-and-gray striped polo shirt and jeans, with his hands cuffed behind his back; at right a male federal officer in a tan/khaki short-sleeve uniform shirt with a black tactical vest bearing yellow 'FEDERAL AGENT' lettering, a ball cap, olive-green tactical pants, and a holstered sidearm. The agent appears to be physically controlling/searching the cuffed subject. The image is a straightforward documentary law-enforcement photo rather than a designed meme; ICE uses such images to publicize arrests of alleged gang members. The only text is on the agents' apparel (ATF POLICE, FEDERAL AGENT). Target audience: general public/social-media followers, signaling joint ICE-ATF enforcement against the Armenian Power gang.
notable_text: ATF POLICE; FEDERAL AGENT (apparel only, no overlaid graphic text)
